name: Larsen & Toubro

description: Larsen & Toubro Limited is a major technology, engineering, construction, and manufacturing company based in Mumbai, India. It is one of the largest EPC companies in India and is ranked among the top 10 global contractors.
vision_statement: To be a global leader in Engineering, Procurement, Construction, Manufacturing and Financial Services with strong presence in high growth markets.
mission_statement: To be the benchmark of excellence in quality, schedule and cost performance in the Indian EPC industry.
sales_motion: Larsen & Toubro's sales motion is focused on building long-term relationships with clients through its global network of offices and partnerships.
customer_lifetime_value: Varies by project and client, but can range from ₹100 crores to ₹10,000 crores (approximately $13 million to $1.3 billion USD)
churn_rate: Low, due to strong relationships and high customer satisfaction

customer_concentration_risk: Low, due to diverse client base and global presence
carbon_footprint: Approximately 2.5 million tons CO2e per year (2020 data)
ethical_sourcing: Larsen & Toubro has a strong commitment to ethical sourcing and responsible business practices

company_maturity: Established, with over 85 years of experience
client_quality: High, with a strong focus on customer satisfaction and loyalty
sustainability_csr: Larsen & Toubro has a strong commitment to sustainability and corporate social responsibility
